params.creature: The address of the Creature contract to register.

params.dnaList: Array of DNA configs for the initial population.

advanceEpoch().notice: Advance through the epoch cycle. Each call moves the phase         forward by one step. Anyone can call once the epoch duration         has elapsed (for IDLE → FEEDING).

deposit(uint256).notice: Deposit stablecoins into the ecosystem.         Shares are minted proportionally to the current vault value.

getCreatureCount().notice: Get the number of active Creatures.

getEcosystemState().notice: Get ecosystem state summary.         deposits = total system value (vault + creature balances).

latestFitness(address).notice: The fitness score from last evolution (creature → score).

owner().notice: Owner / deployer — limited to initial setup.

phase().notice: Current phase in the epoch state machine.

registerCreature(address).notice: Register a newly seeded Creature into the active population.         Only callable by the GenePool (via injectSeed).

setGenePool(address).notice: Set the GenePool address. Called once after GenePool is deployed.

shareValue(address).notice: Compute the value of a user's shares in stablecoin terms.         Uses live system-wide balance (vault + all creatures).

spawnInitialCreatures((uint8,uint8,uint1.notice: Deploy the initial seed population.         Called by the owner or seeder at launch time.

totalCapital().notice: Total stablecoin capital held by the Ecosystem vault.

totalFitness().notice: Sum of all fitness scores (for weighted allocation).

totalSystemValue().notice: Get total system value (vault + all creature balances).

totalYieldGenerated().notice: Track total yield generated across all epochs.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Withdraw stablecoins from the ecosystem.         Burns shares and returns proportional capital + yield.         Uses the live system value (vault + creature balances).
